quote:
The moon beckons the bold; those who linger only taste their own stars.  

When the sentinel of law departs, the arena seems still, yet justice still roots.  

A cage freed by a wind of compassion transforms into a prison of liberty, stronger than iron.  

The battlefield of nations that quarrel within itself is fought with words; the quietest voice wins.  

A ship that sails a strait of tension learns that diplomacy is the secret anchor.  

A rescue team in peril stitches courage into each breath, and each missing soul teaches patience.  

A cyber attack upon a gallery shows that silence can be a shroud, while vigilance is the lantern.
quote_preview: The moon beckons the bold; those who linger only taste their own stars.
